summary: Testing completed for DioCreations admin panel fixes (iteration 9). ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (reorder APIs for services, blog, portfolio). Frontend: All features verified working - animated butterfly logo on login and sidebar, all 13 sidebar menu items visible without overlapping, drag handles on Services/Blog/Portfolio pages, sidebar scrollable on mobile.
passed_tests: Admin login page shows animated butterfly logo (SVG with flapping wings animation)
Admin login page shows 'DIOCREATIONS' text with Exo 2 font
Admin login page shows 'Admin Panel' heading
Admin sidebar header shows animated butterfly logo
Admin sidebar header shows 'DIOCREATIONS' text
All 13 sidebar menu items visible: Dashboard, Homepage, Services, Products, Portfolio, Blog, Testimonials, Contacts, Leads, Chatbot, About Page, Users, Settings
User profile section (Admin + email) at bottom of sidebar
Logout button visible and accessible at sidebar bottom
No overlapping between nav items and user profile section
Sidebar nav has overflow-y: auto for scrollability
Mobile sidebar opens via menu toggle button
Mobile view shows all 13 nav items without overlap
Services page shows drag handles (grip icons) on each service item
Services page shows 'Drag to reorder' instruction text
PUT /api/services/reorder successfully reorders services
Blog page shows drag handles (grip icons) on each blog post
Blog page shows 'Drag to reorder' instruction text
PUT /api/blog/reorder successfully reorders blog posts
Portfolio page shows drag handles (grip icons) on each portfolio item
Portfolio page shows 'Drag to reorder' instruction text
PUT /api/portfolio/reorder successfully reorders portfolio items
All 13 admin navigation links work correctly
GET /api/services returns services list
GET /api/blog returns blog posts list
GET /api/portfolio returns portfolio items list
seed_data_creation: None - using existing seeded data (6 services, 5 blog posts, 19 portfolio items)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel improvements fully verified. Key features: 1) AnimatedLogo component at /app/frontend/src/components/AnimatedLogo.jsx uses SVG butterfly with CSS animations (flap-left, flap-right keyframes). 2) AdminLayout uses flexbox with flex-col, nav has flex-1 overflow-y-auto, user profile section has flex-shrink-0. 3) SortableList/SortableItem components at /app/frontend/src/components/SortableList.jsx use @dnd-kit/core and @dnd-kit/sortable. 4) Reorder endpoints in server.py are placed BEFORE the /{id} routes to avoid route conflicts. 5) Each admin page (Services, Blog, Portfolio) calls PUT /api/{type}/reorder with {order: [id1, id2, ...]} array.

features_verified.animated_logo_login: Working - AnimatedLogo imported in AdminLogin.jsx line 10, rendered at line 85
features_verified.animated_logo_sidebar: Working - AnimatedLogo imported in AdminLayout.jsx line 3, rendered in header div
features_verified.sidebar_flexbox_layout: Working - aside uses flex flex-col, nav has flex-1 overflow-y-auto, user section has flex-shrink-0
features_verified.sidebar_13_menu_items: Working - All 13 items visible: Dashboard, Homepage, Services, Products, Portfolio, Blog, Testimonials, Contacts, Leads, Chatbot, About Page, Users, Settings
features_verified.services_drag_reorder: Working - SortableList with handleReorder calling PUT /api/services/reorder
features_verified.blog_drag_reorder: Working - SortableList with handleReorder calling PUT /api/blog/reorder
features_verified.portfolio_drag_reorder: Working - SortableList with handleReorder calling PUT /api/portfolio/reorder
features_verified.mobile_sidebar_scroll: Working - overflow-y: auto on nav element
